name: Sherrod Brown
subject: have your $26 quadruple-matched!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter, we're coming down to the wire. **We cannot miss goals and risk being forced to take our TV ads off the air.** But we're about to miss our FEC goal. To stop that from happening, we're trying something new. [**Since we need to raise $30,000 by tomorrow at midnight to get back on track, we're launching our special quadruple match program.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe33/4462dc26/79420277/201a17a0/3595703976/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm2?refcode=sbe180929pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183") [**Match our average online contribution of $26 or any amount -- it'll be _quadruple-matched!_**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe33/4462dc26/79420277/201a17a0/3595703976/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm2?refcode=sbe180929pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe33/4462dc26/79420277/201a17a7/3595703976/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0yIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm2?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180929pm2_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe33/4462dc26/79420277/201a17a7/3595703976/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0yIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180929pm2_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe33/4462dc26/79420277/201a17a7/3595703976/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0yIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm2?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180929pm2_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe33/4462dc26/79420277/201a17a0/3595703976/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm2?refcode=sbe180929pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** New polling shows this is a single-digit race. President Trump, Vice President Pence, and the special interests all want me to lose my job. Here's why they want to get rid of me: Because I don't fight for the special interests. Instead, I fight for progress on all the issues this grassroots team is facing: Medicare. Social Security. Planned Parenthood. A livable minimum wage. The list goes on. We don't fight the way they do -- with unlimited spending, vicious attacks, and lies. We fight one average online contribution of $26 at a time. Peter, the stakes couldn't be higher. Republican control in Washington has created mass chaos. This election is a tipping point, and we need to make sure it tips in our favor. [**Give what you can to help us reach $26,000 by midnight tomorrow. Depending on how much you give, it will be quadruple-matched.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe33/4462dc26/79420277/201a17a0/3595703976/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm2?refcode=sbe180929pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183") And please know that I, along with everyone else here on Team Sherrod, very much appreciate whatever you can give. With gratitude, Sherrod

name: Jake Fons
subject: We're still short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We have a problem.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180929PM_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team, Minnesota's a top target for Trump and national Republicans -- we just got word Trump is making his third visit to the state next week and his super PAC just announced a $100,000 ad buy against Tina. We can only expect more attacks and more focus on this race over the next 38 days. And if we are going to have the resources to respond to the waves of attacks that are coming from national Republicans, special interests, and Trump -- we have to hit every goal. **But we have a problem: with our final FEC end-of-quarter deadline approaching tomorrow at midnight -- we 're still falling short of where we need to be.** **[Hitting our $75,000 goal and responding to these attacks will be the difference between sending a true progressive to the Senate or another rubber stamp for Trump. Tina's counting on us before this deadline -- can you pitch in $3 now to keep her fighting for our values in the U.S. Senate?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Lindsey Miller
subject: Martin needs you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Bumping this...

Begin original message:

We'll keep this quick. **Here are the top three reasons you need to _[contribute to Martin's Senate campaign](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+contribute+to+Martinrsquos+Senate+campai&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_4_12&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_4_12&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_4_12")_ before Sunday's Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline:**

* **This is the FIRST FEC report since Libertarian Gary Johnson launched his last-minute Senate bid** \-- meaning Martin and Johnson's numbers will be compared side-by-side.

* **This is the FINAL quarterly FEC report before early voting in New Mexico** and we can't afford to scale back our get-out-the-vote plan.

* This is a critical year for Senate Democrats, and **losing Martin means we lose any chance at taking back the Senate.**

**_[There's still time to help Martin. Contribute here so we reach our FEC budget goal before midnight tomorrow >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Therersquos+still+time+to+help+Martin+Co&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_4_12&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_4_12&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_4_12")_**

name: Blue Pennsylvania
subject: just got the news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d89/51dbcc2a/12038aae/3aa36d0/3055069678/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team:

With just over a month until Election Day, Republicans are bringing their most infamous leaders to Pennsylvania to try and make sure this state goes red this year. On Sunday night the president of the NRA will campaign with Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, and on Tuesday, President Trump will be spreading his message in Philadelphia.

**Trump and the NRA are going to attack Bob _hard_ as we kick off the final month of this campaign. Can you donate right now to help him fight back?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. Trump and the NRA are going to attack Bob hard as we kick off the final month of this campaign. Can you donate right now to help him fight back? If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks. | | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration. name: Paul Begala
subject: how we win the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
One of the few ways Republicans can save their majority is by turning a select few vulnerable blue seats red. And AZ-01 is one of them.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633efa/1a8421e1/19a24c0dc/492187ca/1460869529/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, **Democrats can take back the House this fall.** We're leading in polls across the country and grassroots energy is through the roof. I'm sure you've heard this already. But here's something you may not have heard: **One of the few ways Republicans can save their majority is by turning a select few vulnerable blue seats red._And AZ-01 is one of them._** It's simple, friends: To win the House, Democrats must keep AZ-01 blue. But Tom O'Halleran has been called the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, so the GOP is coming after him, [**and he needs your support today.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.29_b3_pb_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **[Quick, can you make a donation of any size before Tom's end-of-quarter deadline tomorrow? name: Emma Carl
subject: Our final end-of-quarter deadline is tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
At the end of every quarter, campaigns are required to report their fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission, and then those reports become public for anyone to see. Tonight at midnight is our final end-of-quarter deadline of the entire campaign, and we need your help to finish strong.
| | Peter, At the end of every quarter, campaigns are required to report their fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission, and then those reports become public for anyone to see. **Tonight at midnight is our final end-of-quarter deadline of the entire campaign,** and I'm reaching out because we need your help to finish strong. [**Will you make a donation before midnight, to help us end the quarter with the best possible showing?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nDz_zbBY2f4_oJ2BCIW5bU7IznOBV1aW0q6q2iVv2V4=/TuGvU_gXj_7k1564C3pAz_XUmgcikWafdSPxLC0XonA=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.30_b1_ec_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Because our numbers will go public, this is our last big chance to show Rep. Dave Brat and the outside Republican groups targeting us that we have the resources to take them on, all the way through November 6th. I want to thank you for [**your generous support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nDz_zbBY2f4_oJ2BCIW5bU7IznOBV1aW0q6q2iVv2V4=/TuGvU_gXj_7k1564C3pAz_XUmgcikWafdSPxLC0XonA=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.30_b1_ec_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) of our campaign so far, Peter. This incredible grassroots community has powered this campaign from the beginning, **allowing us to turn this once-safely Republican district into a true toss-up race without taking a dollar from corporate PACs.** We are entering the final five weeks of this race with some incredible strength, and that wouldn't be the case without you. So thank you, [**and please consider making a donation of any size before midnight if you can.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nDz_zbBY2f4_oJ2BCIW5bU7IznOBV1aW0q6q2iVv2V4=/TuGvU_gXj_7k1564C3pAz_XUmgcikWafdSPxLC0XonA=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.30_b1_ec_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Emma Carl _Finance Director, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nDz_zbBY2f4_oJ2BCIW5bU7IznOBV1aW0q6q2iVv2V4=/TuGvU_gXj_7k1564C3pAz_XUmgcikWafdSPxLC0XonA=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.30_b1_ec_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nDz_zbBY2f4_oJ2BCIW5bU7IznOBV1aW0q6q2iVv2V4=/TuGvU_gXj_7k1564C3pAz_XUmgcikWafdSPxLC0XonA=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/nDz_zbBY2f4_oJ2BCIW5bU7IznOBV1aW0q6q2iVv2V4=/KXB-dwCcsN95SgFCgKNgWTu8u3YZxoIas0EtY2IdB4E=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

Help! We need $2,716 by midnight tonight to meet our quarterly goal!

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: The way we win this race matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
| Peter -- When I ran for re-election in 2006, our campaign won all 95 counties here in Tennessee -- a first in state history. We did it by working together to find common-sense solutions to the issues hurting our communities. **If we’re going to win again, the same kind of thoughtful approach to the Senate -- rejecting the hyperpartisan conventional wisdom of the Washington Swamp -- is how we’ll do it.** This race is not about “us” vs. “them.” It’s not about my opponent or me. It’s about our kids, our families, and our communities. They deserve better than a dysfunctional Congress shouting across the room instead of getting things done. **Now we have another important fundraising deadline coming up tonight \-- our final end-of-quarter FEC deadline before Election Day. subject: Three days
body:

---
Friend -- Our last campaign fundraising deadline is**tonight at midnight** and your help is critical for our campaign to be able to spread Bruce's conservative message of continuing the fight for **Less Hassle** and **More Freedom**. Democrats would love nothing more than to see a “Blue Wave” on November 6th so they can stop the progress we’ve made so far. Will you take a few short minutes to help Bruce's campaign by making a generous contribution of [**$100, $50 or $25 today**](https://www.brucewesterman.com/r?u=rXPNlDLHiG34-eik-_lyXl4wniylTWc35ceBhVJ5eVrgG3-20LATu9JCvQIXNzkO&e=87de312c4219248fa3631a1188a4b4f4&utm_source=westerman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=midnightfec3&n=2)**?** We are just **$800 from our goal** , so every little bit counts! name: Molly, me
subject: counting on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
Our most important fundraising deadline of the campaign is at midnight tonight, friends. But right now, we need to raise another $13,635 if we're going to flip New Hampshire blue.
I'm not accepting the corporate special interest money that's fueling Chris Sununu's campaign. But that means I won't stand a chance against him and his deep-pocketed right-wing allies without the help of this grassroots team.
**If we're going to take back the corner office and defeat the Trump/Sununu agenda, I'm counting on your immediate donation:**[Please, will you give $5 or more right now- every dollar you can - to help us close this gap and flip New Hampshire blue?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc49ce/d0ce7de/5077cf3c/9cd8544/3901848569/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTQ2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk146-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
I can't do this without you, friends. Thank you.
Molly

subject: 16 hours left to help Bob Casey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d8b/51dbcc2a/12005f30/3aa3458/3263195803/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Here are the facts, quickly.
1. _CNN_ recently published an article noting that Democrats' chances of taking back the Senate depend on Bob winning here in Pennsylvania.

2. Bob has a major fundraising deadline at _midnight tonight_.

3. There are $3,600 match dollars left to unlock, so this morning, _every dollar will be doubled_.

[DONATE $5 (BECOMES $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180930_fr1_v1f2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") The fundraising total that we report after this deadline will send a signal to all of the Republicans watching this race, including President Trump. Any signs of weakness will signal to them that this seat is winnable and they'll go all-in trying to win Pennsylvania, just like they did in 2016.

**With the future of Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security on the line, protections for people with pre-existing conditions on the chopping block, and the makeup of the Supreme Court hanging in the balance, we need to go all-in to protect Bob. Every dollar will be doubled -- what can you give before midnight?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d8b/51dbcc2a/12005f30/3aa3467/3263195803/VEsP/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d8b/51dbcc2a/12005f30/3aa3460/3263195803/VEsHBQ/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d8b/51dbcc2a/12005f30/3aa3461/3263195803/VEsHBA/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d8b/51dbcc2a/12005f30/3aa3462/3263195803/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Bob Casey for Senate emails.
clean_body: "" Here are the facts, quickly. 1. CNN recently published an article noting that Democrats' chances of taking back the Senate depend on Bob winning here in Pennsylvania. 2. Bob has a major fundraising deadline at midnight tonight. 3. There are $3,600 match dollars left to unlock, so this morning, every dollar will be doubled. "" The fundraising total that we report after this deadline will send a signal to all of the Republicans watching this race, including President Trump. Any signs of weakness will signal to them that this seat is winnable and they'll go all-in trying to win Pennsylvania, just like they did in 2016. With the future of Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security on the line, protections for people with pre-existing conditions on the chopping block, and the makeup of the Supreme Court hanging in the balance, we need to go all-in to protect Bob. Every dollar will be doubled -- what can you give before midnight? If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks, Simone Simone Baer Finance Director Bob Casey for Senate | Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Mel Hall
subject: I’ll get right to the point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

I know you're probably getting a lot of emails this week, so I'll get right to the point:

We're facing our campaign's last quarterly FEC fundraising deadline at midnight.

**If we 're going to flip this district, I need all of our supporters to step up now and contribute what they can to my campaign so we can meet our $10,000 goal. Can I count on you to donate now?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Unlike my opponent, I've rejected the backing of corporate PACs and special interests, so I'm counting on supporters like you to chip in and help us get across the finish line.
I'm ready to show up and fight every day for Hoosiers, because the hardworking people of this state deserve a representative who will work hard for them too.

We're laying the groundwork for victory, but I can't do it without you. What we do today will determine whether we turn this district blue in November. Mel Hall

subject: Common decency

---
Peter, **As a former public school teacher, I know how important it is that we protect our safety net and restore common decency to our government.**

Teachers see how social problems are interconnected. As a third-grade teacher, I might have a wonderful lesson plan ready, but if a student comes in hungry or sick, or if she has to suddenly move homes due to financial stress, academic success is unlikely. **Public education is the backbone of democracy, but our children do not have a fair shot at success if they lack health care, if their parents do not earn a living wage, if their environment is polluted.** We must invest in our safety net to achieve equal opportunity.

[**Elect a teacher to Congress. Today is the fundraising deadline: please donate $5 or more today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2408519/13529021/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYxODA5Mi1jZmM0LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qyfQhMwHdJ6EgFLW6Aw7wHMRBFRDhsTe4099ZPzuyQQ=)

**And if we do not invest in education, we will not overcome this growing culture of hatred and division**. Public schools are where we experience and appreciate the diversity of America. How many anti-Muslim Americans have ever had a Muslim neighbor or classmate? How many Texans who support a "Bathroom Bill" for transgender students have ever spoken to a transgender person? Restoring common decency in this country is a long-term investment, but we must start today by investing in our young people, and by investing in our schools. **With 38 days left to the election, we have identified tens of thousands of Texas 10 voters who are ready to elect a teacher to Congress**. Voters understand that this country is on the wrong track. Our job is to make sure every one of them votes in this election.

**[Please contribute today to power this campaign to victory](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2408520/13529022/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYxODA5Mi1jZmM0LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qyfQhMwHdJ6EgFLW6Aw7wHMRBFRDhsTe4099ZPzuyQQ=).** Together, anything is possible. Thank you for your support! With respect, Mike
**[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2408521/13529023/-1950142826?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYxODA5Mi1jZmM0LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qyfQhMwHdJ6EgFLW6Aw7wHMRBFRDhsTe4099ZPzuyQQ=) [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2408522/13529024/862725720?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYxODA5Mi1jZmM0LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qyfQhMwHdJ6EgFLW6Aw7wHMRBFRDhsTe4099ZPzuyQQ=) [Campaign website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2408523/13529025/-1686464446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYxODA5Mi1jZmM0LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qyfQhMwHdJ6EgFLW6Aw7wHMRBFRDhsTe4099ZPzuyQQ=) [ActBlue](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2408524/13529026/-1117660545?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYxODA5Mi1jZmM0LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qyfQhMwHdJ6EgFLW6Aw7wHMRBFRDhsTe4099ZPzuyQQ=)** [ Donate Now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2408525/13529027/2113572082?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYxODA5Mi1jZmM0LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qyfQhMwHdJ6EgFLW6Aw7wHMRBFRDhsTe4099ZPzuyQQ=)

name: DWS (Congresswoman)
subject: what we know (FEC deadline at midnight)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
We know Republicans have their sights set on defeating me. We know that if they maintain control in the House, they will come after Medicare, Social Security, and the Affordable Care Act.
|
---
| | We know Republicans have their sights set on defeating me. We know that if they maintain control in the House, they will come after Medicare, Social Security, and the Affordable Care Act. **And we know that we have to continue fighting if we want to stop them.** We only have another 15 hours to reach our $28,000 FEC goal. __This is the most important FEC goal we've faced yet._ **[Will you rush in a contribution ASAP?](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cb1/622b7b5b/1d10b6d6/307b6bfa/758081085/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180930am?refcode=dwse180930am_m&recurring=true&amount=5")**_ At the end of the day, this campaign isn't about me. It's about all the seniors who rely on Medicare to afford the prescriptions and doctor's visits that keep them healthy and alive. It's about the families who rely on Social Security to pay their bills. It's about the millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions who rely on the ACA for affordable insurance. I take pride in my work to protect Florida families. They count on me to be their voice in Congress, and I take that responsibility seriously. **And right now, I'm relying on you to help us win this campaign and keep on fighting.** [**We can reach this goal by midnight. Get your contribution in before it's too late.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cb1/622b7b5b/1d10b6d6/307b6bfa/758081085/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180930am?refcode=dwse180930am_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you. Debbie
---

|
---

name: TK 2018 - Jessalyn Reid
subject: Khizr Khan, Mark Warner, Terry McAuliffe, Tim Kaine, and Anne Holton emailed you. Did you see them all, Derek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, I know a lot of people have reached out to you recently, and I hope you've been able to read their emails to get their perspectives on what's at stake in November (spoiler alert: a hell of a lot is at stake). _A quick recap on what 's in your inbox:_
* Khizr Khan - _If you read one email today, I hope it is this._
* Senator Mark Warner - _Watch the polls (but also don 't)_
* Tim Kaine - Right now, _we are in a uniquely trying moment in history._
* Anne Holton - _Hello_
* Former Governor Terry McAuliffe - _(no subject)_

All of these people care deeply about Virginia, about our country, about electing Democrats to the House this year, and about re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. That's why they've taken the time to help close the gap on this major goal so that we can end this quarter with fundraising numbers we can be very proud of - numbers Republicans can be very scared of.

[We have just $9,000 to go, which means we're almost done emailing you for this month (I promise we're almost there - the deadline is TONIGHT!). So if you haven't chipped in yet for the month, or think you could afford to send a few more bucks our way, please click here.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f105b/3e0906/712e402a/3e364e47/1910441320/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180930_1_FR_JR_Everyone-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+We+have+just+9000+to+go+which+means+were&utm_campaign=20180930_1_FR_JR_Everyone-LDND&source=20180930_1_FR_JR_Everyone-LDND")

Every time you choose to pitch in and help reach these goals, you're making it possible for us to rely on small-dollar grassroots donations for a substantial part of our funding. That means a lot - and it makes me really, really proud.

Whether you're able to chip in once a week, once a month, or once a year, you're an important part of this team, and we're so grateful that you're with us.

**I hope you 'll go back in your inbox and read any of these important emails you might have skipped (truly, don't miss Mr. Khan's thoughts!), and of course, if you're able to make another donation towards this critical goal by [tonight,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f105b/3e0906/712e402a/3e364e46/1910441320/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180930_1_FR_JR_Everyone-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+tonight&utm_campaign=20180930_1_FR_JR_Everyone-LDND&source=20180930_1_FR_JR_Everyone-LDND") we would be so, so grateful.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f105b/3e0906/712e402a/3e364e44/1910441320/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180930_1_FR_JR_Everyone-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180930_1_FR_JR_Everyone-LDND&source=20180930_1_FR_JR_Everyone-LDND")

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: read first thing
body:
|

| | | Hi - I know it's early on a Sunday, but I wanted this to be at the top of your inbox. Our first public reporting deadline since Brian Kemp became the Republican nominee is midnight tonight. We need to come out of this as strong as possible so everyone knows we can win for Georgia. My team set a goal of reaching 10,000 donations before tonight's end-of-quarter deadline, and we're on track to hit it if we keep going at this rate. Will you help us? name: Team Scholten Debate Update
subject: Why Steve King won’t debate J.D. Scholten
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
A recent poll had us down only six points. And the truly exciting part was that the poll showed that if we get our message out to enough people between now and Election Day, we win.
That’s why Steve King is so afraid to debate. He scared to share a stage with J.D., because he knows that people will vote for J.D. when they hear from a candidate who actually wants to represent the district. This was Steve King’s campaign’s response to a question from a reporter about why he won’t debate J.D.:
We’ve got a spoiler alert for Team King: we expect to win. Steve King would know this too if he ever spent any time talking to the people of this district. Every day, we’re running into more people who are predicting the same thing. If we can reach enough voters in time, Steve King’s tenure in Congress will be over. But to do that, we need your help. [**_We have just over 10 hours left until the final FEC quarterly report; please donate what you can before midnight tonight to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2410253/13545075/23801491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGVlNmY3MC1lMGM0LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tezZfS0dGLZDtvFoKN7t8GMNKgfuad6ERaaTAzhnOrU=)
We can win this thing, together. Thank you.
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Show that super PACs can't overpower me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | I just spoke with Brad and Steve, and I want to share the latest update with you.

**On Wednesday, I shared that we have to raise an additional $75,000 before my critical FEC deadline. As it stands, we 're still $10,795 from closing our budget gap.**

We need to raise this additional money to respond to the Johnson campaign and show his national donors can't overpower me. Plus, this FEC report will be pored over by everyone -- the media, my opponents, and dark-money groups -- to gauge whether I have the strength to win my first reelection campaign in November.

**_[With less than 24 hours to go, we can't miss the mark. Will you pitch in $29 before midnight tonight to help us close our FEC budget gap?](http://nm.martinheinrich. name: Kathy Manning
subject: Highest stakes (personal request)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | At midnight tonight, the final full FEC fundraising quarter of this election ends. I'm putting in a personal request right now -- [**will you rush in your contribution before the deadline hits?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427974/e3b7d3/5d11be58/255549e8/2094282159/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180930am?refcode=kme180930am_m&recurring=true") This grassroots team has been up against some big tests before. And thus far, we've exceeded all expectations. We're taking this from a non-race to a "Toss-Up." We've come from a double-digit deficit to ahead in the polls. **But this is perhaps our biggest test yet.** The people at the FEC aren't the only ones who see our fundraising data -- anyone can. The numbers go public. So if we hit this goal with room to spare, people will know we're ready to go full-steam ahead into October and November. And if we miss it, everyone will know that too. I have seen this network do fantastic things before. I know you won't let me down now. **Let's pass this biggest test yet with room to spare before tonight's deadline.[Whatever amount you can give, give today.](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427974/e3b7d3/5d11be58/255549e8/2094282159/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180930am?refcode=kme180930am_m&recurring=true")** | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427974/e3b7d3/5d11be58/255549e8/2094282159/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180930am?refcode=kme180930am_m&recurring=true")
---
Thank you.
Kathy

subject: bump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Making sure you saw this, Peter. Our Blue Wave team is critical to doing our part helping Democrats in key races up and down the ballot, but we need your help to make it happen.

[**Can Mike count on you to activate your membership with a contribution of any amount?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Zfm2svA1fNBjYrjKQcJ-cTbT1uuVmSPcAqBRtR070OE=/if3eTs1duHLnwvMv8iBq6Cf0b6XcEa8jOsUzk_qECY0=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180930_2_8&amount=10.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
> **We 're making huge gains, but we can't get complacent. At midnight, everything we have in the bank will go public, so we must show that our grassroots team has the resources to sweep the BLUE WAVE to victory!**
>
> [Chip in right away! ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/Zfm2svA1fNBjYrjKQcJ-cTbT1uuVmSPcAqBRtR070OE=/if3eTs1duHLnwvMv8iBq6Cf0b6XcEa8jOsUzk_qECY0=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180930_2_8&amount=10.00&recurring=true)
> Deep-pocketed GOP groups have been funneling tens of millions of dollars into key races across the country in last-ditch efforts to hold on to their majority.
>

Deep-pocketed GOP groups have been funneling tens of millions of dollars into key races across the country in last-ditch efforts to hold on to their majority. They're afraid of our momentum and know that we're not giving up the fight so this is our last chance to show that we are not letting their attacks go unchecked. * Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: This is possible
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c0/9e00690/5fbf7e03/2401d185/2391636363/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&source=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx")
Friends,

Since we won the Democratic primary for Governor of Florida, we've seen something that the pundits have insisted no longer exists in politics: a belief in the possibility of progress.

We've seen it in the messages we've received on social media, from volunteers who worked on campaigns during the last election cycle, and are already fired up and ready to start knocking doors for our campaign. Everyday Floridians believe they can make a difference.

**[We're seeing it as the contributions roll in from nearly 52,000 online donors in the general election, at an average contribution of less than $33. If you'd like to become one of those people, you can do so right here, right now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c0/9e00690/5fbf7e03/2401d19d/2391636363/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-belief-resend?gpsid=8_55_4054&refcode=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+Were+seeing+it+as+the+contributions+roll")**

We saw it when the Republicans failed to repeal the Affordable Care Act, President Obama's healthcare plan that covers millions of Americans, and millions here in Florida.

Today, I want to encourage each and every one of you to keep on believing, because I know we can accomplish great things together.

We believe it is still possible to rebuild Florida into a state where teachers are given the opportunity to give the best education possible to our students, where we trust them to make their own lesson plans, provide them with the resources they need to build their classrooms, and pay them the salary they deserve -- because our kids deserve nothing less.

We believe it is still possible to make progress in our fights for equal rights for all on the state level -- no matter the color of your skin, your nation of origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, ability, age, or class. Yes, we believe it is still possible to make this progress even during the Trump presidency.

**[If you still believe in doing everything we can to make these dreams a reality, please contribute to help us get out the vote and win this election on Tuesday, November 6.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c0/9e00690/5fbf7e03/2401d19c/2391636363/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-belief-resend?gpsid=8_55_4054&refcode=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+If+you+still+believe+in+doing+everything")**

Together, we're going to rebuild Florida. I can't wait.

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c0/9e00690/5fbf7e03/2401d19f/2391636363/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-belief-resend?gpsid=8_55_4054&refcode=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c0/9e00690/5fbf7e03/2401d19e/2391636363/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=12+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c0/9e00690/5fbf7e03/2401d191/2391636363/VEsHBg/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=13+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&source=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c0/9e00690/5fbf7e03/2401d190/2391636363/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=14+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&source=em18_180930_belief_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx")

name: Team Maggie
subject: real quick

Friend,

I'm not going to sugar coat this -- this race is close, really close. _And while I hate to do this, I need you more today than ever before._

If we don't meet our goals this month, everyone will know we're falling behind Tammy Baldwin.

And friend, we can’t let that happen! We need to make sure we come out strong and show everyone the incredible support we have for taking proven, effective leadership to DC.

I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 before midnight on September 30th. Friend, we just can't afford to fall behind now.

Wisconsin NEEDS a voice in the Senate that doesn’t come from the far left, but comes from the working class people that make our state — and our country — what it is. Someone who KNOWS the Wisconsin Way.

It's about working hard – and never giving up. It’s about leaving our kids with a world better than the one we received. It's about making sure every person has a voice in our process.

I will be that voice. Where Tammy Baldwin has abandoned our way, I will fight for it.

But it’s going to take all of us working together to reach important goals like the one I'm writing about today.

We have to raise this $50,000 to send Tammy Baldwin back to the private sector.

I hope you'll chip in now: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c2ab6525324040818bc1dd9a57b4ff3b&_e=c7WiBVXk8efe-h8pt5aq4HCpjLEbekL6t88qUV5PMDnv3QMUu1lWupdBN62-BsJiTP-k4CfcC5sDTRBYEeXgdcraylTRmgc8dMeWO1N89hOFG5p1Qs2r6-zcWjoOcCEZ1BdXgWQQ19T7Pf_eEtSJgc3qTOUWsixTLduu8tgbKbKKUzNd7o860xFTavd7Ujzg6YSjAeLy9aWvqgvJXsaY_Uvls2r630lkxWgoqYiqI2eRLZyxqLmHrZVJCm99AwnNO6xpr6mUI_LyhyWyCXOhBiDFVCSJi2ltciFT8kdiv4k_Y9qw5m1kqMsjpOEVVFTXPKBO2VUk4eYN40wDPtRJZk7vmfnn8-yFy_rm3tR7AkAoQyyBxjLqfiMowiu8W4aJIqU68vuBYqe_M7Gbam0jCvEDZWiLZrAhJNIteTxzCD0%3D)**

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c2ab6525324040818bc1dd9a57b4ff3b&_e=w2j_HorC0dGIkihmXUB4NuZLtHCBba8cuTNKpaNie_yCk3BxCeaGheb7HOA5qZ_vlDCwGqWoCKJuhrP4lHHO_X1IbIzpfi5d6uTWd2rxfpdRsnmzzferMYXwuZCcSqFaewmz-IBbeeeq8nFtVrX3K2hxKTOAWcjkaMy29Bk64pwzn3JrKtjLbVvbHJKB2y5TcQIh3FbvEgJZMP-_9W7pi0Kje0rl73ByC8VMsUgvwOwJL4SwttYBrSCMR9xxSPQh). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c2ab6525324040818bc1dd9a57b4ff3b&_e=c7WiBVXk8efe-h8pt5aq4DhpbcyyDbISB4pCX2CPqJsWtNO8myOHimZEuo3fYsuwDUbmxWcJULuVyaMnXWtQIClGIs3sVZhE2_e9bfaczyftfwiIlFGmS22jF0g4CDm3903rd1ZaONI_YNa6yt-O0GSdZYiyR1EvKKnLjhtRKRNB-VA8EMUky1rnmyVv90JRadCNz1G_n6jUCx_E9hzsQqVHsuX_wME3sj-7z60pWUvxlLSbZx20kPvjFgFhPqZ95uZvmr2JNjOTisuVMoH_BwfPawuNhBqjCWZJT1A-oKzXktDIChV1wBV31DTEr0hjIqRoW5Mv9OdFzVkKRjiPrEftzA1ECNCH6EaNZm02McUKdCDs0YmumfsmgWbs0nCr) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c2ab6525324040818bc1dd9a57b4ff3b&_e=c7WiBVXk8efe-h8pt5aq4DhpbcyyDbISB4pCX2CPqJsyGEfd6u-tMsn9kF4U7YKvq6Cob3PEO9vng-JC5qPPBKgbMppdSxYnKqXzi5dXJyKC0ZN8aul9INjQ-9KpFd9TUDEZinLUvE2HSyhQjb7qYTkrnnDDxWDh2PLhFDlX-L3NoHzRqFdCTMpKVvtVR_ZlUo0cF_JSMaVU8QL0tZi2g-vr7j5Y7Xgo7nvUeovTR5f5qOyzRik6xD2WJaMlaQYO7lGYY2_N7vjMBpiTG3mLcx3NExUUsH7C3CkQA0VguNBt4WuByPE2G-9p2CFyUXV0pxe-r6N4_0sf3c0opjUfFtBAqwgDYPKJSsv7b9U6Od8NjBmjIoIBmez2ckQgDRAy) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c2ab6525324040818bc1dd9a57b4ff3b&_e=c7WiBVXk8efe-h8pt5aq4OsQ7UR-IEnN4BB1Y_v-DmsaFerRWYZp9N49QpbnDwQhJQ7Zc6UBlY57KAGQVsOaKOC_k0KyJiUykEaeHL06FIjp8X6MnutOrGhf2565CQ1NHaL0T96_79v7xjBwJysgSloPeo5f3o0TUNqDvzRblfymUdvDxSOH9PFX83GOZwLbH2qr8ZV9qwS1uKP274hj2FDLUfXyc1mXil7F4JSOAvWM9ILUi-4mnWre_5BXanNhA3HhoykvanAMm7Z8eOL7zg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c2ab6525324040818bc1dd9a57b4ff3b&_e=c7WiBVXk8efe-h8pt5aq4OV5EWruVBST1taln-XgJFZ3txQnvkjIUPJmNMusrzkKP478TgVr1w-iby6kqig0GtbCvFz-04M6f5nT-cQIptBEwQZne_xoGOoVGbG6P0QXDvWkNUEUlcD_rLRMCRorn4uaEv0bXnvu5YEbAjhSjahe9omr-z2JfZEUDiRdYZrFPhACINjBkHo3HBLL0gB_OaIGMQk6OeMwnFYPeezIoWsZImNAxcBF39ilbU-FH4YodIwuge0HzH5J3EikNsnAdg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c2ab6525324040818bc1dd9a57b4ff3b&_e=c7WiBVXk8efe-h8pt5aq4KOhukn8zsEpU8XIi4tL8hv7y-SkXzHbzC76Z6BOzBVhqaZgyWjoaMy3fwqICQAQZIUT7E2JV543hDDwlLRmBFyzrF92VJhFXuD8B6jC2X8cnCJL1FFDk3Fgu5Q7pQerXnTUSUWyWayYIhcQYEGP8K1BnnDSCzsz4vDyeU5okuf7PCgGmhMAgJL2ziOYiIuBdHKTnUTK5K9tRSM05QY8sKl3eJfvruCUF0ed9MZmACTjtapjCxK4DBl4i4icVaNqpg%3D%3D) feed. clean_body: I just checked in on our END OF QUARTER goals and it looks like we still have $9,302 left to go! Friend, I just checked in on our END OF QUARTER goals and it looks like we still have $9,302 left to go! Friend, I know I've said it before but we MUST reach our goals to succeed and DEFEAT Tammy Baldwin. Without the resources, we simply won't be able to fight off her ruthless attacks in the final month. That's the LAST thing I want. Please, chip in today to help reach our goals and bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington. I’m counting on you, Leah \------------forwarded message below------------ Friend, we’re just 2 days away from one of the biggest tests our campaign has faced. It's our LAST end of quarter fundraising deadline before election day. And let me tell you why that's important. If we don't meet our goals this month, everyone will know we're falling behind Tammy Baldwin. And friend, we can’t let that happen! We need to make sure we come out strong and show everyone the incredible support we have for taking proven, effective leadership to DC. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 before midnight on September 30th. Friend, we just can't afford to fall behind now. Wisconsin NEEDS a voice in the Senate that doesn’t come from the far left, but comes from the working class people that make our state — and our country — what it is. Someone who KNOWS the Wisconsin Way. It's about working hard – and never giving up. It’s about leaving our kids with a world better than the one we received. It's about making sure every person has a voice in our process. I will be that voice. Where Tammy Baldwin has abandoned our way, I will fight for it. But it’s going to take all of us working together to reach important goals like the one I'm writing about today. We have to raise this $50,000 to send Tammy Baldwin back to the private sector. I hope you'll chip in now: Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

subject: This is what we’re doing to win

body:

#
Peter -- We are committed to running our campaign the right way in these final weeks of this race -- bringing people together to get our message in front of voters, and tuning out the partisan noise. To do that, we’re relying on the help of grassroots supporters like you -- which is why you’re getting emails from us asking for your help. **But before we ask you to pitch in, I wanted to show you what your support is doing for our campaign:** With your help, we’ve joined Tennessee Victory in opening 24 fields offices across Tennessee. From now to Election Day, these offices are going to be filled with people of every background getting ready to knock doors, hit the phones, and put our message of working together to get things done for Tennessee in front of voters. **Your support is what’s making this all possible.** Unlike our opponent, we’re not relying on special interests or out-of-state mega-donors -- we’re relying on grassroots supporters just like you. So I’m asking: **Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can before midnight to support our grassroots campaign to bring common sense to Washington? name: Samantha Maltzman
subject: I'm going over the numbers friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

We are down to the final few weeks of the election. Time is literally running out.

I have been going over the campaign finances and trying to make sure that our field teams and organizers around the state have everything they need to build a huge get-out-the-vote effort before Election Day.

But we aren't there yet. We need you to help power us through these last six weeks before the election and build the grassroots momentum we need to win on Tuesday, November 6th.

[**Can you help us hit our end-of-quarter goal with a contribution of $3 or more to Senator Bob Menendez today? Your support can put this campaign in a great place going into the final weeks.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cd3/3af3c5d/394f63b0/4ec32d9a/2823310512/VEsH/ name: Mark Warner
subject: Watch the polls, Derek - but also don't
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
It was just four years ago, in 2014, when my race for Senate looked like a sure bet -- and turned out to be anything but. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, polls are always close in Virginia. They just are.

Last year, we saw that work in our favor when Democrats at the state level won in districts that had long been written off.

**But it was just four years ago, in 2014, when my race for Senate looked like a sure bet -- and turned out to be anything but. What looked like a gigantic lead up until Election Day turned into a nail biter the night of.**

[Will you chip in to make sure Tim shows strength when this quarter's numbers get revealed tomorrow? He has to fill a $7,100 gap to reach his goal by tonight.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1047/3e0906/713df16b/3e364246/1561725673/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+make+sure+Tim+shows+&utm_campaign=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS&source=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS")

Listen, polls just don't tell the whole story. Whether they show Tim up by double digits, or Corey Stewart inching much closer, we're not going to let any poll numbers define us. We'll stay focused on building the best program for Virginia, and giving our great House candidates the boost they need to come out on top in their races too.

And most importantly: We're not going to take anything for granted. We're at the biggest deadline of the election, and soon it'll be time to turn out some voters. So it's all hands on deck now, Derek.

**Can you help me push Tim over the edge of his goal? If most of you reading this chip in $5, we can knock this goal out of the park by[tonight:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1047/3e0906/713df16b/3e364244/1561725673/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+tonight&utm_campaign=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS&source=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1047/3e0906/713df16b/3e36425b/1561725673/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+5&utm_campaign=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS&source=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS")

_Senator Mark Warner_

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1047/3e0906/713df16b/3e364257/1561725673/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS&source=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1047/3e0906/713df16b/3e364256/1561725673/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=15+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS&source=20180930_2_FR_MRW_surrogate-LDND-RS") Thanks for having Tim's back!

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Hey again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Hey again. Jeff Weaver here.
I wanted to send a quick note about an official FEC fundraising deadline Bernie has tonight. You may remember those from the presidential campaign.
Those were the days we’d raise millions of dollars in a single day, and everyone’s mouths would drop about how we were funding our campaign in an unprecedented way. To be honest, the response on those days shocked me too.
Anyway, like I said, Bernie has another one of those deadlines tonight, and it’s important. He doesn’t need to raise millions of dollars this time, but he does have a few modest goals we have to reach as part of his re-election campaign to the U.S. Senate.
So, if you can afford it, please make a $3 donation to Bernie’s re-election before midnight tonight. Here’s a link for you to use:
**[http://act.berniesanders.com/go/september-deadline](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/2715?refcode=em180930-full&t=1&akid=180%2E150750%2ExHQVkI)**
You know Bernie. He’s not running around asking millionaires or billionaires to fund his re-election. So your donation means a lot. Especially today.
All my best,
Jeff Weaver
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=180%2E150750%2ExHQVkI). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&akid=180%2E150750%2ExHQVkI).

name: Jeff
subject: sorry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Denham for Congress
body:
With less than 24 hours left until our FINAL End of Quarter deadline of the race, we're $2,092 short of our goal.
Friend, I hate to reach out on a weekend but this is important.

With less than 24 hours left until our FINAL End of Quarter deadline of the race, we're $2,092 short of our goal.

I need you to step up right now and chip in what you can to stop Harder and his radical allies from taking over California.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: FW: Our final end-of-quarter deadline is tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Before the deadline at midnight, I wanted to reach out personally and say you are the backbone of our campaign.
| | Peter, Thank you for the support today. Since Emma reached out this morning, we've seen a surge in our grassroots fundraising that will enable us to have a very strong end to the quarter. But before midnight, I wanted to reach out personally and say you are the backbone of our campaign. From the day I decided to run, it was important to me that this be a true grassroots effort, and we would not have the resources to share my story and my ideas without this team. If you haven't yet had a chance to contribute this quarter -- you can at the link below. Thank you! [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/spanbergerwq32018**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HW7PX3kj4va_DV6xHpcg1aMQrGsoN9ypbEST866kflQ=/pNElnY-NEynirURl4KR1SyC_rabbCLeOf7c9lKUPmYM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.30_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Emma Carl Sent: Sun, Sep 30, 8:35 AM Subject: Our final end-of-quarter deadline is tonight Friends, At the end of every quarter, campaigns are required to report their fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission, and then those reports become public for anyone to see. **Tonight at midnight is our final end-of-quarter deadline of the entire campaign,** and I'm reaching out because we need your help to finish strong. [**Will you make a donation before midnight, to help us end the quarter with the best possible showing?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HW7PX3kj4va_DV6xHpcg1aMQrGsoN9ypbEST866kflQ=/pNElnY-NEynirURl4KR1SyC_rabbCLeOf7c9lKUPmYM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.30_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Because our numbers will go public, this is our last big chance to show Rep. Dave Brat and the outside Republican groups targeting us that we have the resources to take them on, all the way through November 6th. I want to thank you for [**your generous support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HW7PX3kj4va_DV6xHpcg1aMQrGsoN9ypbEST866kflQ=/pNElnY-NEynirURl4KR1SyC_rabbCLeOf7c9lKUPmYM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.30_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) of our campaign so far, friends. This incredible grassroots community has powered this campaign from the beginning, **allowing us to turn this once-safely Republican district into a true toss-up race without taking a dollar from corporate PACs.** We are entering the final five weeks of this race with some incredible strength, and that wouldn't be the case without you. So thank you, [**and please consider making a donation of any size before midnight if you can.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HW7PX3kj4va_DV6xHpcg1aMQrGsoN9ypbEST866kflQ=/pNElnY-NEynirURl4KR1SyC_rabbCLeOf7c9lKUPmYM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.30_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Emma Carl _Finance Director, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HW7PX3kj4va_DV6xHpcg1aMQrGsoN9ypbEST866kflQ=/pNElnY-NEynirURl4KR1SyC_rabbCLeOf7c9lKUPmYM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.30_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HW7PX3kj4va_DV6xHpcg1aMQrGsoN9ypbEST866kflQ=/pNElnY-NEynirURl4KR1SyC_rabbCLeOf7c9lKUPmYM=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/HW7PX3kj4va_DV6xHpcg1aMQrGsoN9ypbEST866kflQ=/aDeJfLR4WcmlXU8e1KE6GeZjyQQCfMaN3i07rd4M0_4=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Governors are on the frontline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We're working to build our progressive movement. Can you help?

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf7d/2f5ea88d/75249461/2cbc76de/2710680858/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&utm_campaign=eom-1-resend&utm_medium=ema") Friend, While President Trump rails against our democratic institutions and attacks our freedoms, Democratic governors are on the frontline fighting to protect the progress we've made. That's why I'm so proud to lead our movement as the chair of the Democratic Governors Association. In 2018, we have the strongest bench of Democratic candidates running for governor ever. **Twelve of our candidates are women,** contesting governor's seats from Maine to Kansas, Michigan to Idaho and Oregon. **Stacey Abrams could make history in Georgia as the first black female governor, Andrew Gillum the first black governor of Florida, Ben Jealous of Maryland the former chair of the NAACP, and Lupe Valdez the first openly gay Latina governor of Texas**. _Our movement in 2018 is as diverse and as strong as the country we love._ Friend, we need leaders like these across the country who will support and fight for our values. [**I'm asking you to join me in this fight. The work you and I do together right now will help stem the chaos left behind by the other Washington. Can you pitch in to help?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf7d/2f5ea88d/75249461/2cbc76de/2710680858/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&utm_campaign=eom-1-resend&utm_medium=ema") [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf7d/2f5ea88d/75249461/2cbc76de/2710680858/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&utm_campaign=eom-1-resend&utm_medium=ema") | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf7d/2f5ea88d/75249461/2cbc76de/2710680858/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&utm_campaign=eom-1-resend&utm_medium=ema")
---
I wish I could introduce you _personally_ to **Jared Polis** in Colorado, **Christine Hallquist** of Vermont, and **Governor** **Kate Brown** of Oregon, who are**proud representatives of the LGBT community.** And, I wish you could meet my friend **Billie Sutton, paralyzed in a rodeo accident,** who is in place to become South Dakota's next governor.
Here at home and across the country, I'm working hard to ensure we can continue standing up to Donald Trump's attacks on our progressive values. [**Will you join me in fighting back against the chaos of the other Washington and help us build this progressive movement?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf7d/2f5ea88d/75249461/2cbc76de/2710680858/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&utm_campaign=eom-1-resend&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf7d/2f5ea88d/75249461/2cbc76de/2710680858/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-1-resend&utm_campaign=eom-1-resend&utm_medium=ema")

name: Greg (personal)
subject: counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |

I knew it wouldn’t be easy.

As I’m typing this, I’m on the road to our next Team Pence campaign event, but I just wanted to let you know we’re so close to hitting our final quarterly goal before November.

We only need $1,912 more to hit our $30,000 goal and demonstrate that our conservative, Hoosier-first agenda is exactly what Sixth District Hoosiers want.

Your investment now will make sure we have the final resources needed to ensure every 6th District Hoosier has the chance to get out, vote, and make their voice heard.

I know I can count on my fellow Hoosiers to make this last push to hit our goal before midnight tonight and lead us to victory in November.

Jamie, my finance director who emailed you this morning, created a safe and secure link for you to donate here: **[https://secure.gregpencevictory.com/action-405676/](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=f95c8eb96ec74810b857f9000dc37950&_e=q-7dMq3xu_trjf39KZsciTXll7yeZ1402hOCfu9OA-5FRCzmY6EcxdKxBr2fWP_8_wZ7oIXVmrKKfFuE1O8QC0HjEiNJYp7hBQIWKnGkNgznbIG2KGhPtEOBHtRSUVRaLNQ3lqp_n-3KYA-sXY7gprtHj4K5FUQ2uSm3FTzsXl4XNIwUdGNGBIOaKJim242XFvTqOGkgTK2RgGM54CnPrbZG7QDlmWqScg83HxyjJOkZFCFVudzQXm5FOCQW-zLEt8GaM3fKdG0yNJnOXkTTpQ2Y_Qe0JP296xlY7i7WfwkpKRjv18-OWGTEcGJMC4eUKiiN-ZpDWn2zHsTw-vcL-hg-QjldV3_Fy95qgjW-NVXgDIvrFjAfzHwsTmJHBub2mGCPM8A_8NzWwX3mHb433khABRnHyaudtvPZ_QWf8Zg%3D)**

I’m Ready to Serve, Again!
Greg

name: Khizr Khan
subject: If you read one email today, I hope it is this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, I'm writing today because Senator Kaine needs our help.

There are a lot of great campaigns and programs this year that will make sure we elect representatives with our values to Congress. **They all deserve your support if you can spare it, but as a Virginian, what Tim Kaine is doing is very dear to my heart.**

**First:** Senator Kaine is working together with all eleven House candidates. His resources are their resources, they share offices and staff. When I donate to his campaign, send an email on his behalf, or attend an event, I am helping Virginia create a path to take back the House _and_ the Senate.

**Second:** Tim Kaine's opponent reminds me of someone I know, someone I have spoken up against before. He says things that are mean-spirited. He seeks to divide us. So this, Derek, is an election we must win.

**His campaign tells me they are further behind in fundraising than they had hoped to be, with $5,000 more to raise by[midnight tonight.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f104d/3e0906/710bcf00/3e3645d4/621328930/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180930_3_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ-RS&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+midnight+tonight&utm_campaign=20180930_3_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ-RS&source=20180930_3_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ-RS") I know these people, I know how thoughtfully they spend your donations.**

[Can you join me by clicking here and helping them reach this goal?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f104d/3e0906/710bcf00/3e36442b/621328930/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180930_3_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ-RS&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+join+me+by+clicking+here+and+hel&utm_campaign=20180930_3_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ-RS&source=20180930_3_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ-RS")

Thank you for reading my message today.

Respectfully,

_Khizr Khan_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f104d/3e0906/710bcf00/3e36442a/621328930/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180930_3_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ-RS&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180930_3_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ-RS&source=20180930_3_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ-RS")

name: Brandon Davis, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: "Tilt-Democratic"
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c7/9e00690/5f918f4f/2401d213/2294939127/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180930_RateRR_fnd_gq_act_Resend_BD_ettx&source=em18_180930_RateRR_fnd_gq_act_Resend_BD_ettx")
**_Inside Elections_ moves Florida Governor's race
from "Toss-Up" to "Tilt-Democratic"**
**[Chip in now to help Mayor Andrew Gillum bring it home
on Tuesday, November 6 >>](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c7/9e00690/5f918f4f/2401d212/2294939127/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-ratings-change-tiltd?gpsid=13_55_4045&refcode=em18_180930_RateRR_fnd_gq_act_Resend_BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180930_RateRR_fnd_gq_act_Resend_BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yesl&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+now+to+help+Mayor+Andrew+Gillum+")**
[DONATE NOW](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c7/9e00690/5f918f4f/2401d215/2294939127/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-ratings-change-tiltd?gpsid=13_55_4045&refcode=em18_180930_RateRR_fnd_gq_act_Resend_BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180930_RateRR_fnd_gq_act_Resend_BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+NOW")
---

Friends,

On Election Day, voters won't just be choosing between Mayor Andrew Gillum and Ron DeSantis -- they'll be choosing between two very different visions for the state of Florida.

Mayor Gillum believes in a state where everyday people have access to affordable healthcare, great public schools, and a clean, healthy environment -- while Ron DeSantis believes in Donald Trump and corporate special interests.

**[But this newest rating change shows that Floridians are ready for a leader who will move our state forward. Will you chip in $5 to help us keep the momentum going?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c7/9e00690/5f918f4f/2401d22d/2294939127/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-ratings-change-tiltd?gpsid=13_55_4045&refcode=em18_180930_RateRR_fnd_gq_act_Resend_BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180930_RateRR_fnd_gq_act_Resend_BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+But+this+newest+rating+change+shows+that")**

This race is one of the most competitive -- and most watched -- in the country. But we know that polls and projections don't win races -- people do.

So, while Ron DeSantis may have chosen to run a divisive and toxic campaign straight out of Trump's playbook, we're running one based on hope, aspiration, and inspiration. And we have less than 40 days to make sure every voter knows that Mayor Gillum is the only candidate who will put everyday Floridians first.

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- "" Inside Elections moves Florida Governor's race from "Toss-Up" to "Tilt-Democratic" "+" "" Friends, On Election Day, voters won't just be choosing between Mayor Andrew Gillum and Ron DeSantis -- they'll be choosing between two very different visions for the state of Florida. Mayor Gillum believes in a state where everyday people have access to affordable healthcare, great public schools, and a clean, healthy environment -- while Ron DeSantis believes in Donald Trump and corporate special interests. "" This race is one of the most competitive -- and most watched -- in the country. But we know that polls and projections don't win races -- people do. So, while Ron DeSantis may have chosen to run a divisive and toxic campaign straight out of Trump's playbook, we're running one based on hope, aspiration, and inspiration. And we have less than 40 days to make sure every voter knows that Mayor Gillum is the only candidate who will put everyday Floridians first. "+" Thank you, Brandon Davis Campaign Manager Andrew Gillum for Governor "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 240 N. Magnolia Drive Tallahassee, FL 32301

body:
Hey friends -
I wanted you to see the latest update from Craig (see below). We still need to raise $2,439 before tonight's critical end-of-month deadline, and with only 37 days until Election Day, missing this goal isn't an option if we're going to flip New Hampshire blue.
The Koch brothers and other dark-money organizations are spending big to defeat me - so I can't tell you how important your support is right now. I truly can't win without you.
Here's the link to give before midnight - every dollar makes a difference! ****[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc49c1/d0ce7de/507a4c95/9cd854e/2933712995/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTQzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk143-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
Thanks so much.
- Molly
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Craig Brown
Sent: Sun, Sept 30, 2018 4:18 PM
Subject: Re: September goal
To: Molly Kelly
Just looked at our fundraising, Molly, and we're falling a little short. We need to get $2,439 before midnight, I think we can get there but we're going to need some help. We can't afford to miss this goal so close to the election - can you reach out to our top supporters and see if they can help us close this gap?
- Craig
From: Molly Kelly

Subject: September goal
To: Craig Brown
Hey Craig -
37 days out! How are we doing on our month-end deadline - are we going to hit our goal?

body:
| Peter -- I promise, this will be the last email from my team about tonight’s end-of-quarter deadline. First, I wanted to thank you for all the support you’ve shown already. I’ve been humbled by the momentum our campaign has in this Senate race -- and it’s only been possible because of people like you stepping up to support us. When we launched our campaign, very few pundits or Washington politicians were paying attention. They didn’t think a Senate race in Tennessee would be much of a contest. Now, we’ve got their attention. Our message of getting things done is resonating with Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. And with just weeks left before Election Day, the opposition is throwing more than just the kitchen sink at us to try and sway this race. By chipping in before tonight’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, you’re doing more than just helping us finish this campaign strong -- you’re sending a message to the Washington Swamp that a campaign focused on working together to get things done can still win elections. **I hope I can count on you to add a donation of whatever amount you think is best to our campaign before tonight’s deadline.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2415003/13595591/510384404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2ZkNGM3MS0xN2M1LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUFHkoDH2VpsvlXIbCaJy8qr63t3bp5CXwAFW_s38Ss=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em180930-eoq-7-express-10&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

body:

| | | This is it! We have less than 12 hours to our LAST quarterly FEC deadline before the election.

**_[Help us show Gary Johnson that he has no shot at beating Martin this year. Contribute now so we post our strongest numbers yet>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Help+us+show+Gary+Johnson+that+he+has+no&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180930_3_15&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180930_3_15&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180930_3_15")_**

_Begin original message:_

I just spoke with Brad and Steve, and I want to share the latest update with you.

**On Wednesday, I shared that we have to raise an additional $75,000 before my critical FEC deadline. As it stands, we 're still $10,795 from closing our budget gap.**

We need to raise this additional money to respond to the Johnson campaign and show his national donors can't overpower me. Plus, this FEC report will be pored over by everyone -- the media, my opponents, and dark-money groups -- to gauge whether I have the strength to win my first reelection campaign in November.
