name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Will you sign my Supreme Court petition, please?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Before I was aware of the allegations against Judge Kavanaugh, I watched the responses to my colleagues during his initial nomination hearings. I examined his judicial writings and past public statements. I reviewed the limited number of documents that Republicans shared about Judge Kavanaugh's time working in the White House. Based on what I saw, I was a "no" long before last week's hearing began.
On Thursday, I joined much of our country in watching Dr. Ford testify about her allegations of sexual assault against Judge Kavanaugh.
And Friday, I watched as 11 Republicans (all men) voted to advance Judge Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court and shared in the frustrations of many people -- especially women.
But this fight isn't over. There is now going to be a one-week pause so the FBI can investigate the grave and credible charges against Judge Kavanaugh, and I intend to give it my all on the Senate floor to stop Brett Kavanaugh from receiving a lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court.
I'm already a "No," everyone, and I can't stop this nomination from moving forward alone -- I need your help. [**Will you please sign our petition calling on my colleagues in the Senate to stop forcing Kavanaugh through?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc057/2a380d31/30c4d4da/f15d0e/4128129226/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180709_PreSCOTUSnominee?source=e20180929_kavanaugh_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Mitch McConnell himself said that Republicans intend to "plow right through" with this nomination. That's alarming in and of itself, but it is especially concerning considering these allegations and the thousands of pages of unreleased records related to Kavanaugh's history.
If you haven't taken action yet, time is running out and we desperately need your voice. Below you'll find the link to our petition, and I am personally asking you to sign:
[**https://hassan.bsd.net/Believe-Women**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc057/2a380d31/30c4d4da/f15d0e/4128129226/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180709_PreSCOTUSnominee?source=e20180929_kavanaugh_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you, this is so important.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc057/2a380d31/30c4d4da/f15d0f/4128129226/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDkyOV9LYXZhbmF1Z2hfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180929_Kavanaugh_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc057/2a380d31/30c4d4da/f15d08/4128129226/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.
Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

From: John Kasich
To: Peter
Subject: It's working
We're quickly approaching Sunday's fundraising deadline and [could use your help](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=3b3cdf4b5d5a400e89b69068d8674fe5&_e=ujdOgaQpKzJ0QMhhHo2KhMdypeYa9gm8LmgjNrLx7VgYItCQeYFcK3ZWAafVCfq0JU7_rzZOLKwGxzHZEGNoFQjS6GAvAtAstePq9nE8ZmIOGPyQXZ_OioHDl_WJk-hJ4zZRyMtEtWKoa4oGrewW6wTHwy0eFIiBrFN1BRx7CTh94vfu0JqjwkWhy_gQEAGzaHokR93sZm2K840_vhxvGlilWl-MsWhbg1MHS72ChXQsh6Z-JTFDtY70CN_M0g5edSv2MVV86LBv6UasM9aeKimNhijkr9kPaPtyWGhVyBg%3D).
**On Wednesday, I called for a delay on the vote to allow time for an investigation into the serious accusations against Judge Kavanaugh**. I am relieved to see that Senate Republicans have agreed to give this the attention it deserves.
Our message is making a real difference. But there is a lot more work to do.

subject: No tricks, no gimmicks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, this is the last email I'm going to send you in [September 2018.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1043/3e0906/711ac2e7/3e364433/1668259100/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+September+2018&utm_campaign=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND&source=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND") No tricks, no gimmicks. I promise no one from the team will be back in your inbox [tonight.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1043/3e0906/711ac2e7/3e364432/1668259100/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+tonight&utm_campaign=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND&source=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND")

This is also the last email of the most important fundraising quarter in what is quite possibly the most important election year in recent history. I don't really need to add any drama or urgency to that - reality pretty much speaks for itself these days.

**So I 'll keep it simple:** We have just $3,500 more to raise [tonight](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1043/3e0906/711ac2e7/3e364431/1668259100/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+tonight&utm_campaign=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND&source=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND") in order to reach our goal. I feel confident and I really hope that people like you will step up. It would be a great feeling to wake up [tomorrow](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1043/3e0906/711ac2e7/3e364430/1668259100/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND&source=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND") and know we can start October strong.

**If you haven 't chipped into Tim Kaine's campaign yet this month, you can click an amount below to make a donation and add your name as one of the committed September donors who helped us reach this critical milestone:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1043/3e0906/711ac2e7/3e364437/1668259100/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+5&utm_campaign=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND&source=20180930_4_FR_JN_last-LDND")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b258c4db3abe/action-required-today-527865?e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Friends,

Let’s be frank, I know we’ve been asking for money a lot this quarter.

I’ll keep this short. Today at midnight is the deadline to contribute to my campaign and be recognized on the quarterly fiscal report. Our campaign must show a strong financial report to show the liberal left Democrats, we mean business and we are not going to let them take down me or President Trump.

[I’ll thank you now for your continued support, our future depends on it!](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=b259fe03f9&e=7ca82c1e3d). I need your help today, every dollar makes a big impact in our race.

The Democrats have shown they will do anything to destroy the Majority in the Senate and House of Representatives. Any contribution you can make will help me get back to fighting for Arizona, we are much stronger against the left when we work together.

[Let’s STOP the outsiders who are trying to influence this election! ](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=da4aceda75&e=7ca82c1e3d)

Thank you for standing with me,

---
|
---
| Dr. Paul Gosar
Member of Congress
Arizona's 4th District

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friends, Let’s be frank, I know we’ve been asking for money a lot this quarter. I’ll keep this short. Today at midnight is the deadline to contribute to my campaign and be recognized on the quarterly fiscal report. Our campaign must show a strong financial report to show the liberal left Democrats, we mean business and we are not going to let them take down me or President Trump. . I need your help today, every dollar makes a big impact in our race. The Democrats have shown they will do anything to destroy the Majority in the Senate and House of Representatives. Any contribution you can make will help me get back to fighting for Arizona, we are much stronger against the left when we work together. **NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**SUNDAY, SEPTEMBER 30th**
|
---
**_A Note From Wayne_**
Dear Derek,
This was a long and eventful week in New Hampshire and national Republican politics.
The week began with Elizabeth Warren directing Massachusetts liberals to come up to New Hampshire to promote liberal candidates - your work and volunteering for our candidates is crucial to making sure their efforts are in vain.
We also saw this week the continuation of the Judge Kavanaugh confirmation hearings. We support the 7th FBI background check of Judge Kavanaugh’s career and we’re confident he will be cleared of these baseless allegations that lack any corroborating evidence.
We look forward to Judge Kavanaugh becoming Justice Kavanaugh when the FBI Investigation is concluded and the Senate advises and consents to his nomination - not a search and destroy of his life.
It has also been another great weekend of Republicans getting out and making voter contacts across the state. Offices have been opened in North Conway and Keene yesterday and the Edwards for Congress Campaign expanded their office space in Manchester.
Republicans continue to be fired up and ready to win this November!
As always, thanks for all you do!
Sincerely,
Wayne MacDonald

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER SUNDAY, SEPTEMBER 30th | A Note From Wayne Dear Derek, This was a long and eventful week in New Hampshire and national Republican politics. The week began with Elizabeth Warren directing Massachusetts liberals to come up to New Hampshire to promote liberal candidates - your work and volunteering for our candidates is crucial to making sure their efforts are in vain. We also saw this week the continuation of the Judge Kavanaugh confirmation hearings. We support the 7th FBI background check of Judge Kavanaugh’s career and we’re confident he will be cleared of these baseless allegations that lack any corroborating evidence. We look forward to Judge Kavanaugh becoming Justice Kavanaugh when the FBI Investigation is concluded and the Senate advises and consents to his nomination - not a search and destroy of his life. It has also been another great weekend of Republicans getting out and making voter contacts across the state. Offices have been opened in North Conway and Keene yesterday and the Edwards for Congress Campaign expanded their office space in Manchester. Republicans continue to be fired up and ready to win this November! As always, thanks for all you do! Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. NH.GOP/LEADRIGHT EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK A packed house for Eddie Edwards at his office expansion! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our spotlight this week shines on the Saint Anselm College Republicans! They have a great energized group and are hitting a lot of doors this cycle for Republican candidates! TWEETS** OF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | House Speaker Gene Chandler Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Senate President Chuck Morse Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Executive Council Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Governor Chris Sununu Web - "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - Web - Facebook - Twitter - Chairman Wayne MacDonald "FOLLOW" on Twitter - 10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 Phone: tel:6032259341 "tel:6032259341" | Email: mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" • mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: =?utf-8?Q?Linda_S=C3=A1nchez?=
subject: Reaching out personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
It's so important that we make our goal in order to continue assisting the Democratic challengers we're counting on to flip the house.
Peter, I wanted to talk to you personally before our public FEC deadline tonight. It's so important that we make our goal in order to continue assisting the Democratic challengers who we're counting on to flip the house. **[Will you pitch in before midnight?](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?refcode=RTW_180930_EOQ2_EM&amount=9&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Since the California primary in June, I've worked tirelessly on behalf of the Democratic nominees. With your help, I've worked to rally progressive energy and resources behind them. I've introduced you to a few of them -- Harley Rouda, Mike Levin, Katie Hill, and more -- and I know each and every one of them would be an incredible member of Congress.

[**Can you please chip in $9 (or more) tonight to help me meet our goal and help us flip the House?**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?refcode=RTW_180930_EOQ2_EM&amount=9&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I would greatly appreciate it -- and I know you always step up when we need it most.

Onward to November,
Linda

You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by [**donating here.**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366fa/4ac3d62d/6a21b3b9/1ce295c4/3454097035/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ls_support?refcode=footer&amount=25.00&recurring=auto")
Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. Still support Linda but want fewer emails? **[Go here](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366fa/4ac3d62d/6a21b3b9/1ce295c5/3454097035/VEsC/ "https://secure.voteforlinda.com/page/signup/linda-sanchez-lite")** to sign up to receive less email from our campaign. [**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366fa/4ac3d62d/6a21b3b9/1ce295da/3454097035/VEsD/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.

Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
PO Box 59660
Norwalk, CA 90652
